tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or possible diabetes, while current glucose is within normal limits. All other parameters, including renal function and electrolytes, are within or very close to normal ranges, except for a minimally elevated chloride, which is likely not clinically significant. No acute laboratory abnormalities detected.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
